name: @patchworkos/morning-brief
description: Daily 6am digest: Gmail unread, Linear assigned issues, Slack DMs, and today's calendar — composed into one Slack message.
author: patchworkos

SLACK_CHANNEL.description: Slack channel ID or name to post the morning brief to (e.g. #morning-brief or your DM ID)

LINEAR_TEAM_ID.description: Linear team ID to scope assigned-issue queries

CALENDAR_MAX_EVENTS.description: Maximum number of calendar events to include
